ab: i ta drusa kuzulj sa drusa pulu sa drusa cavilj, na kaygi anga a asihu a pita mibungsiw na kacalisiyan ta ngadan makayanga pasa ita ngadan nua kinacalisianan.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: na humung aken ta cuacuayanga kilevuci pasa ta sihu a pita mibusuw pizuwanan ta “pasa ita ngadan na kinacalisian’’ i qinalja a maacuvucuvung. lja savan ti camaq.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年camaq。
en: I interviewed camaq, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: tucu a sisekesekez a qadaw na pinedjan aken ati madju tu mazuwa ta umaq nimadj a humung.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: a humung tazuw, pasemalaven aken ni madju tu pinakasinuan a ngadan ni madju, utanga kacuin aken a pakeljang ta tacekeljan ni madju, ta qinaljan ni madju.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: ku kivadaan ti madju a kumaya ki temezeng pasupavalit ta ngadan, nakuya sipavecikana a kakudanan ta sicuayan.
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: kakivuin aken ni madju, ayatua na sipavecikan ta ciniwkukan ini a mapacengceng a pkeljangn ta ngadan ni madju, azuma cawcaw maytucu anan a qivu “ca sinsi” ut manasika sidjawljan tu paseliyaw tua penapedjeli.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「查先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him “Cha Xian Sheng”, which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: lja savan ti camaq kivu, “a tja kaulidan a ngadan nu kinakacalisiyan a sivecikan ta ngadan mavan na djaljemedjem, aza ku ngadan sikaqeljangan tu anema men nu zukan, ljanema men a djumaan, nidjen a kinapatalevanan i kacawan. puzangalan tu makaya maljeliav azukan a cawcaw kipakim ta su kiningadangan.”
ch: camaq kivu說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: camaq kivu said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
